description: This MCP exposes the full user and profile side of the backend. It handles signup, login, profile fetching, profile updates, evolving user context, discovery feeds, contact import, friend requests, and user-side recommendation activity. This is the main surface for reading and updating the real user object, while the recommendation system stays as derived algorithmic state.

tools.name: register
tools.description: Creates a new user account and the canonical user profile.

tools.name: login
tools.description: Signs a user in and returns their token and current profile.

tools.name: logout
tools.description: Logs the current user out by removing their token.

tools.name: me
tools.description: Fetches the canonical signed-in user profile, including evolving context fields like dynamic_profile_summary, profile_notes, and effective_description.

tools.name: update_me
tools.description: Updates the canonical signed-in user profile. This is the main place where an MCP can keep learning more about the person over time.

tools.name: onboarding_questions_preview
tools.description: Checks whether the current user description is rich enough or whether more clarification questions should be asked.

tools.name: discovery_feed
tools.description: Returns the main friend recommendation feed for the signed-in user.

tools.name: discovery_query
tools.description: Finds people from a natural-language description of the kind of friend the user wants.

tools.name: search_users
tools.description: Searches users by visible text fields like name or description.

tools.name: friends_list
tools.description: Lists the current user's accepted friends.

tools.name: user_detail
tools.description: Fetches one user's profile card with compatibility and contact visibility info.

tools.name: friend_requests
tools.description: Lists incoming and outgoing pending friend requests.

tools.name: create_friend_request
tools.description: Sends a friend request to another user.

tools.name: respond_to_friend_request
tools.description: Accepts, declines, or cancels a friend request.

tools.name: contacts
tools.description: Lists imported contacts and matched users already found in the system.

tools.name: import_contacts
tools.description: Imports contacts so the backend can find which of them are already users.

tools.name: activity_event_collection
tools.description: Stores recommendation-related user actions like viewing, clicking, or opening a match.
